title: AN ACT TO AMEND SUBPARAGRAPHS 22 AND 23 FOR THE PROVINCES OP LANAO AND LEYTE, RESPECTIVELY, PAGES 142 AND 143, PARAGRAPHa, TITLE D, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED NINETY-THREE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4104 / 57 OG No. 12, 2110 (March 20, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2883, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND SUBPARAGRAPHS 22 AND 23 FOR THE PROVINCES OP LANAO AND LEYTE, RESPECTIVELY, PAGES 142 AND 143, PARAGRAPH

a

, TITLE D, SECTION ONE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY HUNDRED NINETY-THREE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Subparagraphs 22 and 23 for the provinces of Lanao and Leyte, respectively, pages 142 and 143( paragraph a, Title D, Section one of Republic Act, Numbered Twenty hundred and ninety-three, are hereby amended by deleting item (c) from said subparagraph. 22 and by adding the same to subparagraph 23, to be, known as item (o), so that the said subparagraphs shall read as follows:

"22. Lanao

"(a) Butig Water System

Improvement of Spring and

Water System .........................3,000.00

"(b) Pantar Water Supply, Baloi................10,000.00

"23. Leyte

"(

a

) Matag-ob Waterworks

Completion ....................................5,000.00

"(

b

) Almeria Waterworks

Construction ................................15,000.00

"(

c

) Caibiran Waterworks

Repair and improvement .................10,000.00

"(

d

) Calubian Waterworks

Repair and improvement................10,000.00

"(

e

) Barrio Cahagnaan Waterworks, Matalom

Repair and improvement ...................5,000.00

"(f) Anahawan Waterworks

Completion ...........................................18,000.00

"(

g

) La Paz Waterworks

Construction ................................10,000.00

"(

h

"(

g

) La Paz Waterworks

Construction ................................10,000.00

"(

h

) Burauen Waterworks

Repair and improvement..................10,000.00

"(

) Sta. Cruz Waterworks, Bontoc

Repair and improvement..................10,000.00

"(

Construction ...............................15,000.00

"(

) Barrio Guindapunan Waterworks, Carigara

Construction ...............................15,000.00

"(

l

) Barrio Laboon Waterworks, Maasin

Construction and/or

improvement .........................6,000.00

"(

m

) San Roque Waterworks .................5,000.00

"(

n

) San Isidro Waterworks ...................20,000.00

"(

o

) Tabango Waterworks .................30,000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
